title: J.C.C.P. Solar Installation
shortDescription: Installed a 10kW solar system for J.C.C.P. headquarters in Nairobi.
longDescription: We designed and installed a 10kW grid-tied solar system at J.C.C.P. headquarters, providing backup power and reducing electricity costs by 60%.
procedure: Site assessment, system design, installation of panels and inverter, connection to grid, testing and handover.

title: I.O.M. Solar Water Pumping
shortDescription: Solar water pumping system for I.O.M. refugee camp in Kakuma.
longDescription: We installed a 5kW solar water pumping system for I.O.M. to provide clean water to 5000 residents.
procedure: Site survey, pump sizing, solar panel installation, pump installation, training of local staff.

title: UNICEF Solar Backup
shortDescription: Solar backup system for UNICEF offices in Nairobi.
longDescription: We supplied and installed a 15kWh battery backup system with solar panels for UNICEF regional office.
procedure: Energy audit, battery sizing, installation of panels and battery system, monitoring setup.

title: ADRA KENYA Solar Lighting
shortDescription: Solar lighting for ADRA Kenya community centre.
longDescription: We installed solar lighting and power for ADRA Kenya community centre in Mathare.
procedure: Community engagement, solar panel installation, wiring, lighting fixtures, training.

title: EU Funded Solar Project
shortDescription: Solar installation at EU-funded school in Turkana.
longDescription: We implemented a 20kW solar system at a school funded by the European Union, providing power for 300 students.
procedure: Project planning, procurement, installation, commissioning, training of teachers.

title: Samaritans Purse Solar
shortDescription: Solar power for Samaritans Purse health clinic.
longDescription: We installed a 3kW solar system with battery storage for a health clinic in Wajir.
procedure: Needs assessment, system design, installation, testing, training of clinic staff.
